# Deliberately malformed composer fixture.
#
# Used by Phase 1 tests to lock in the loud-failure invariant:
# any parse error MUST reach the API response (no silent zero).

SCHEDULE WORKSTATION_A#STREAM_X
  AT 0100
  :
  JOB_OK
    SCRIPTNAME "/opt/etl/ok.ksh"
    STREAMLOGON etluser
  JOB_BROKEN
    SCRIPTNAME "/opt/etl/broken.ksh"
    STREAMLOGON etluser
    @@@ this line is not valid composer syntax @@@
  JOB_ALSO_OK
    SCRIPTNAME "/opt/etl/also_ok.ksh"
    STREAMLOGON etluser
END
